5/30/26: Notice thatProject 4contributes 8%
to your total score, whileHomework 5contributes 3%, but should take at most an hour or two.  With that much
higher return on investment, you'd be wise to switch your focus off Project 4
for a short time sometime before Thursday evening to be sure you do
Homework 5.
